modules.voiceover: मेरा बेटा हर इम्तिहान में अव्वल आता था। मेरी सोने की मुर्गी। मैंने कहा, "बेटा, तुम्हें हर रोज़ पढ़ना है, IIT से कम कुछ नहीं!"
modules.image_generation_prompt: A proud middle-aged Indian mother in a simple saree stands behind her teenage son who is studying intently at a cluttered wooden desk, set in a modest 1990s Indian home, stacks of textbooks, dim tube light. The boy looks tired but focused. [character_image_url]
modules.video_generation_prompt: A slow zoom onto the tired but determined face of a teenage Indian boy studying late at night under a table lamp, books piled high around him, his mother's shadow looms in the background. [character_image_url]

modules.voiceover: एक दिन उसने अपनी सारी किताबें बंद कीं... और बोला, "माँ, अब मुझसे और नहीं होगा।"
modules.image_generation_prompt: The same Indian teenage boy, his face etched with extreme stress and despair, pushes a stack of books away from him on his study table. The room is the same but feels suffocating. [character_image_url]
modules.video_generation_prompt: The boy's hands slam a thick textbook shut. The camera tilts up to his face, showing a look of finality and exhaustion, he looks directly at the camera breaking the fourth wall. [character_image_url]

modules.voiceover: आज... उसके कमरे में खामोशी है... और मेरे हाथ में बस उसकी पुरानी मार्कशीटें।
modules.image_generation_prompt: The same room, now empty, covered in a thin layer of dust, sunlight streaming through the window. The mother, now looking older and filled with regret, sits on the floor, clutching his old, yellowed marksheets.
modules.video_generation_prompt: A close-up shot of the mother's trembling hands holding old, frayed marksheets. The camera slowly pulls back to reveal the tragically empty and silent room, her face filled with profound, silent grief.
